page_metadata.biotools__summary:
IceR improves proteome coverage and data completeness in global and single-cell proteomics.

IceR - Quantitative Label-Free Proteomics Workflow.

Label-free proteomics enables the unbiased quantification of thousands of proteins across large sample cohorts.
